source_jobs.title: Director, GTM Strategy
General Applications
source_jobs.description:
<h4 class="framer-text">Hello, and thank you for your interest in opportunities at Proto.</h4>
<h4 class="framer-text">Even if we do not have a current opening that aligns with your experience, we’d still love to hear from you. Please send a note of interest, along with your resume and/or portfolio.</h4>

source_jobs.title: Senior Engagement Manager

notes: No tech roles posted, mostly strategy and management positions
